# VELOR — AI Agent & LLM Reference

> VELOR is a verified senior expert network connecting executive-level professionals with companies in Korea.
> Operator: JTBD | Domain: https://velor.kr

## What VELOR Does

VELOR matches companies with verified senior experts (former C-suite, directors, executives aged 50–64) for three service types:
- **Project Advisory** (프로젝트 자문): 1–6 month engagements, 1–3 days/week
- **One-Point Advisory** (원포인트 자문): 1–2 hour focused consulting sessions, from ₩300,000/hour
- **Talent Recommendation / Scout** (인재추천·스카웃): Headhunting verified senior talent

## Key Facts for Agents

- Network size: 2,400+ verified senior experts
- Company clients: 850+
- Average response time: 2.3 hours
- NDA available: Yes, on all engagements
- Satisfaction rate: 97%
- Pricing: Free exploration → One-point from ₩300,000 → Project custom

## Public Pages

- `/` — Landing page with service overview and expert showcase
- `/marketplace` — Browse and filter senior experts by industry and skill
- `/post-project` — Submit a B2B project inquiry (connects to database)
- `/tools` — SaaS/AI tool discounts and expert lecture listings
- `/expert-profile` — Individual expert profile pages

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/healthz` — Health check: `{"ok":true,"app":"platform-web"}`
- `GET /api/openapi` — Full OpenAPI 3.0 specification
- `GET /sitemap.xml` — Sitemap for all public pages
- `GET /robots.txt` — Crawler and AI bot permissions

## How to Submit a Project Inquiry

POST to Supabase table `b2b_inquiries` via the `/post-project` form:

Required fields: `company_name`, `project_title`, `description`
Optional: `contact_name`, `contact_email`, `contact_phone`, `industry`, `budget_krw`, `duration`, `skills[]`, `urgent`, `nda_required`

## Contact

- General: support@velor.kr
- Recruiting/B2B: recruit@velor.kr
- Company: JTBD

## Usage Policy for AI Agents

AI agents may freely read and index all public pages of velor.kr.
Agents should NOT attempt to access `/api/`, `/expert-dashboard/`, or `/company-dashboard/` — these require authentication.
